title: Simple Silver
description: Simple Silver adds a new ore tier: silver, a diamond alternative combat-wise strong against undead but iron-tier otherwise. It trades some durability for better enchantability and introduces a Hunger Resistance potion, giving rotten flesh a second wind.
body:
### Description:
Minecraft’s tool and armor progression is a bit linear: stone → iron → diamond → netherite.
**Simple Silver** adds a **new ore tier: silver**, a diamond alternative with unique combat mechanics.

Silver gear **is as effective as netherite against undead** mobs. **Against other enemies, silver performs at iron-level strength**, encouraging players to think before they swing. Moreover, **silver trades a bit of durability for increased enchantability**, adding further trade-offs. Since it's a diamond alternative, **silver matches diamond in mining speed** and **can break the same blocks**.

The mod also introduces a **Hunger Resistance potion**, giving **rotten flesh**, the worst item in the game, a second wind.

### Key Features:
- Discover **silver ore, a highly enchantable** but slightly less durable **diamond alternative**, just above deepslate layers:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Overworld Ore Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d7cb6f8d9407b40f4e2dd90de2f7ef5f7e21576.png)
  
</details>

- Or mine it in the **Nether’s Basalt Deltas**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Nether Ore Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd9b318062089c4c6f25dd0dec4ac19fbdce60a5.png)
  
</details>

- Use silver to craft **blocks**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3855856e535f96a7ddc55876ba98230cdea4b9d2.png)
  
</details>

- Forge **tools and armor** specialized for fighting the **undead**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Tools and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1165479edaa2daf351ac1aec3a341a8440782042.png)

![Simple Silver Armor on Player Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed115f08b0c0d772835726bae204f5797fc28c4.png)
  
</details>

- Brew **Hunger Resistance potions**, finally giving **rotten flesh** a real use:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Potions, Ores and Misc. Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70a6403a8f307770e36d8588ff1af6e4eb90459c.png)
  
</details>

- Silver **tools** deal iron-level damage generally, but **netherite-level damage to undead**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34459f089b112c1de610ec0aab3342420696203d.png)
  
</details>

- Silver armor gains extra protection and toughness **when fighting undead**, reaching **netherite-tier defense**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e08448b03d5c4777f0094ddf1c3a0d12e3d4f7a.png)
  
</details>

- With **Hunger Resistance I**, rotten flesh works like **bread**; with **Hunger Resistance II**, it’s as good as **steak**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16da22e8c11f9946f278d30d465c0f8d2c3a45ed_0.webp)
![Simple Silver Hunger Resistance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a673a9a8ccc92f5e048baa6af5b7a6c0639c1b0_0.webp)
![Simple Silver Hunger Resistance II](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d1aa13e6ea9d966024d516a216736039957d64_0.webp)
  
</details>

- Complete **new advancements** to guide your exploration of Simple Silver’s features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler (click to show)</summary>

![Simple Silver Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dccfa758c8f25ce8d2f1efda812c2555f8191fa.png)
  
</details>
